messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: A diagram of average cost per ticket — the number the human intends to reduce
What it solves: WHY HE WANTS IT: his stated intent is to REDUCE it. Right now THERE IS NO NUMBER TO REDUCE. Cost
is visible per-role and per-hour, but never per unit of DELIVERED WORK. Without cost/ticket,
every efficiency decision on this project — park idle roles (BL-324), clear context (BL-309),
cheaper models …
How it works: An average cost per ticket is derived from real usage

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-338 - A diagram of average cost per ticket — the number the human intends to reduce is complete.
